allow:
Bash(/tmp/replace-gray.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$count = 0
Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\krist\\Documents\\app\\src" -Recurse -Include "*.tsx","*.ts" | ForEach-Object {
    $content = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw
    if \($content -match 'gray-'\) {
        $newContent = $content -replace 'gray-', 'zinc-'
        Set-Content -Path $_.FullName -Value $newContent -NoNewline
        Write-Output $_.FullName
        $count++
    }
}
Write-Output ""
Write-Output "Total files modified: $count"
PSEOF)

Bash(python -m uv run playwright install chromium)
